description_long: This object consists of a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical shape, slightly bulging at the center, and reinforced by several dark metal hoops. The wood staves are vertically aligned and show a natural, weathered brown texture, giving the barrel an aged, rustic appearance. The top and bottom are flat, with the top surface slightly recessed, and the metal bands are evenly spaced to provide structural integrity. Surrounding the barrel are several broken wooden planks and curved metal bands, suggesting the remains of another barrel or a recently damaged one. The set also includes a large, square wooden crate with visible planks and a rough, utilitarian finish. The overall scene evokes a storage or shipping area, with objects that might be found in an urban alley, warehouse, or loading dock.
description: A weathered wooden barrel with metal hoops, surrounded by broken planks and a large wooden crate, evoking a rustic storage or shipping area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the intact barrel, a large wooden crate, and scattered broken planks and metal bands.
description_view_1: Side view with the barrel and crate aligned, highlighting the circular top of the barrel and the thickness of the crate.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the barrel and crate, with broken planks and bands more visible on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the crate and barrel from behind, with broken wood and metal bands in the foreground.
